Scenic Eye - Gig Guide
Source: https://www.sceniceye.co.uk/  (content frame: https://scenicmind.co.uk/sceniceye)
Snapshot taken: 2026-06-14
Guide week header: 11 June – 17 June 2026
Region: Havant · Waterlooville · Emsworth · Hayling Island

=== Thursday 11 June 2026 ===
